title: Star Map 25 — readable proofs (canonical documentation)
description: Stable references the AI must ground on; shown beside generated explanations.

proofs.title: Investigation reward multiplier
proofs.body: Each investigation awards round(point_value × multiplier) game_points. Default multiplier is 1.2 (Season 2 +20%). Display and awards use the same formula.

proofs.title: Status API (source of truth for UI)
proofs.body: Poll or load once for progress, multiplier, and walkthrough tier. Sync profile via POST /api/star-map/25/sync-profile.

proofs.title: Profile walkthrough (10 tiers)
proofs.body: Tiers unlock by investigation count (1,3,5,…,25). Each tier names a UI capability (3D, planet intel, 4D view, etc.).

proofs.title: Planet deep intel (5 levels)
refs: Alien tier includes catalog line with “Already had this behavior.” when using server fallback
proofs.body: Click a planet chip on a card to fetch five depth levels; xenos classification is depth 3 in the fallback generator.

proofs.title: Buildup & collect
proofs.body: After investigating a system, place buildings/units; pending points accrue. Collect posts game_points. Daily reset window can multiply structure output (see system levels config).

proofs.title: Per-system levels 1–5
proofs.body: Levels rise with placements in a system (buildings + units). Higher levels unlock stronger structures in JSON rules.

proofs.title: Investigate (once per point)
proofs.body: Awards points once per user per point_id; investigations list stored in data/star_map_25_investigations.json.

proofs.title: Legacy tactical hints
proofs.body: Short tips; does not include proof blocks. Prefer /ai-guide for narrative + proofs.
